front.title: Algorithm Identifiers for Hash-based Signatures for Use in the Internet X.509 Public Key Infrastructure

abstract.t: This document specifies algorithm identifiers and ASN.1 encoding formats for the Hash-Based Signature (HBS) schemes Hierarchical Signature System (HSS), eXtended Merkle Signature Scheme (XMSS), and XMSS^MT, a multi-tree variant of XMSS, as well as SPHINCS+, the latter being the only stateless scheme. This specification applies to the Internet X.509 Public Key infrastructure (PKI) when digital signatures are used to sign certificates and certificate revocation lists (CRLs).
